title: Claude Mythos explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Anthropic's Claude Mythos as a frontier model representing a significant leap in reasoning capability similar to o1. The video highlights concerns about token privatization and limited access to advanced model capabilities for certain use cases, framing token disparity as a key emerging issue in AI.
